mapper.sql: ID, itemID, shopID, labelID, level, militaryLevel, guildLevel, guildShopLvlStart, guildShopLvlEnd, worldLvlStart, worldLvlEnd, isDiscount, vipLevel, occupation, limitType, buyNum, currencyID, price, discountPrice, discount, promotion, sort, upTime, downTime, overdue, duration, bind, refreshCurrency, refreshNum, shopType ,countdiscount,openday,closeday
mapper.select:
select
distinct
'true' as QUERYID,
from shop
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into shop (ID, itemID, shopID, labelID, level, militaryLevel, guildLevel, guildShopLvlStart, guildShopLvlEnd, worldLvlStart, worldLvlEnd, isDiscount, vipLevel, occupation, limitType, buyNum, currencyID, price, discountPrice, discount, promotion, sort, upTime, downTime, overdue, duration, bind, refreshCurrency, refreshNum, shopType ,countdiscount,openday,closeday ) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{itemid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{shopid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{labelid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{level,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{militarylevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{guildlevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{guildshoplvlstart,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{guildshoplvlend,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{worldlvlstart,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{worldlvlend,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{isdiscount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{viplevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{occupation,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{limittype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{buynum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{currencyid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{price,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{discountprice,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{discount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{promotion,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{uptime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{downtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{overdue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{duration,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{bind,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{refreshcurrency,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{refreshnum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{shoptype,jdbcType=VARCHAR },#{countdiscount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{openday,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{closeday,jdbcType=INTEGER} )

insert into shop
ID,
itemID,
shopID,
labelID,
level,
militaryLevel,
guildLevel,
guildShopLvlStart,
guildShopLvlEnd,
worldLvlStart,
worldLvlEnd,
isDiscount,
vipLevel,
occupation,
limitType,
buyNum,
currencyID,
price,
discountPrice,
discount,
promotion,
sort,
upTime,
downTime,
overdue,
duration,
bind,
refreshCurrency,
refreshNum,
shopType,
countdiscount,

mapper.update:
update shop
ID = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
itemID = #{record.itemid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
shopID = #{record.shopid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
labelID = #{record.labelid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
level = #{record.level,jdbcType=INTEGER},
militaryLevel = #{record.militarylevel,jdbcType=INTEGER},
guildLevel = #{record.guildlevel,jdbcType=INTEGER},
guildShopLvlStart = #{record.guildshoplvlstart,jdbcType=INTEGER},
guildShopLvlEnd = #{record.guildshoplvlend,jdbcType=INTEGER},
worldLvlStart = #{record.worldlvlstart,jdbcType=INTEGER},
worldLvlEnd = #{record.worldlvlend,jdbcType=INTEGER},
isDiscount = #{record.isdiscount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
vipLevel = #{record.viplevel,jdbcType=INTEGER},
occupation = #{record.occupation,jdbcType=INTEGER},
limitType = #{record.limittype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
buyNum = #{record.buynum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
currencyID = #{record.currencyid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
price = #{record.price,jdbcType=INTEGER},
discountPrice = #{record.discountprice,jdbcType=INTEGER},
discount = #{record.discount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
promotion = #{record.promotion,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sort = #{record.sort,jdbcType=INTEGER},
upTime = #{record.uptime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
downTime = #{record.downtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
overdue = #{record.overdue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
duration = #{record.duration,jdbcType=INTEGER},
bind = #{record.bind,jdbcType=INTEGER},
refreshCurrency = #{record.refreshcurrency,jdbcType=INTEGER},
refreshNum = #{record.refreshnum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
shopType = #{record.shoptype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
countdiscount = #{record.countdiscount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bind = #{record.openday,jdbcType=INTEGER},
bind = #{record.closeday,jdbcType=INTEGER},

update shop set ID = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, itemID = #{record.itemid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, shopID = #{record.shopid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, labelID = #{record.labelid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, level = #{record.level,jdbcType=INTEGER}, militaryLevel = #{record.militarylevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, guildLevel = #{record.guildlevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, guildShopLvlStart = #{record.guildshoplvlstart,jdbcType=INTEGER}, guildShopLvlEnd = #{record.guildshoplvlend,jdbcType=INTEGER}, worldLvlStart = #{record.worldlvlstart,jdbcType=INTEGER}, worldLvlEnd = #{record.worldlvlend,jdbcType=INTEGER}, isDiscount = #{record.isdiscount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, vipLevel = #{record.viplevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, occupation = #{record.occupation,jdbcType=INTEGER}, limitType = #{record.limittype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, buyNum = #{record.buynum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, currencyID = #{record.currencyid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, price = #{record.price,jdbcType=INTEGER}, discountPrice = #{record.discountprice,jdbcType=INTEGER}, discount = #{record.discount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, promotion = #{record.promotion,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sort = #{record.sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, upTime = #{record.uptime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, downTime = #{record.downtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, overdue = #{record.overdue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, duration = #{record.duration,jdbcType=INTEGER}, bind = #{record.bind,jdbcType=INTEGER}, refreshCurrency = #{record.refreshcurrency,jdbcType=INTEGER}, refreshNum = #{record.refreshnum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, shopType = #{record.shoptype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, countdiscount = #{record.countdiscount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, openday = #{record.openday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, closeday = #{record.closeday,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update shop
itemID = #{itemid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
shopID = #{shopid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
labelID = #{labelid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
level = #{level,jdbcType=INTEGER},
militaryLevel = #{militarylevel,jdbcType=INTEGER},
guildLevel = #{guildlevel,jdbcType=INTEGER},
guildShopLvlStart = #{guildshoplvlstart,jdbcType=INTEGER},
guildShopLvlEnd = #{guildshoplvlend,jdbcType=INTEGER},
worldLvlStart = #{worldlvlstart,jdbcType=INTEGER},
worldLvlEnd = #{worldlvlend,jdbcType=INTEGER},
isDiscount = #{isdiscount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
vipLevel = #{viplevel,jdbcType=INTEGER},
occupation = #{occupation,jdbcType=INTEGER},
limitType = #{limittype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
buyNum = #{buynum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
currencyID = #{currencyid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
price = #{price,jdbcType=INTEGER},
discountPrice = #{discountprice,jdbcType=INTEGER},
discount = #{discount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
promotion = #{promotion,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sort = #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER},
upTime = #{uptime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
downTime = #{downtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
overdue = #{overdue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
duration = #{duration,jdbcType=INTEGER},
bind = #{bind,jdbcType=INTEGER},
refreshCurrency = #{refreshcurrency,jdbcType=INTEGER},
refreshNum = #{refreshnum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
shopType = #{shoptype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
countdiscount = #{countdiscount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
openday = #{openday,jdbcType=INTEGER},
closeday = #{closeday,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update shop set itemID = #{itemid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, shopID = #{shopid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, labelID = #{labelid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, level = #{level,jdbcType=INTEGER}, militaryLevel = #{militarylevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, guildLevel = #{guildlevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, guildShopLvlStart = #{guildshoplvlstart,jdbcType=INTEGER}, guildShopLvlEnd = #{guildshoplvlend,jdbcType=INTEGER}, worldLvlStart = #{worldlvlstart,jdbcType=INTEGER}, worldLvlEnd = #{worldlvlend,jdbcType=INTEGER}, isDiscount = #{isdiscount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, vipLevel = #{viplevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, occupation = #{occupation,jdbcType=INTEGER}, limitType = #{limittype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, buyNum = #{buynum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, currencyID = #{currencyid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, price = #{price,jdbcType=INTEGER}, discountPrice = #{discountprice,jdbcType=INTEGER}, discount = #{discount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, promotion = #{promotion,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sort = #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, upTime = #{uptime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, downTime = #{downtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, overdue = #{overdue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, duration = #{duration,jdbcType=INTEGER}, bind = #{bind,jdbcType=INTEGER}, refreshCurrency = #{refreshcurrency,jdbcType=INTEGER}, refreshNum = #{refreshnum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, shopType = #{shoptype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, countdiscount = #{countdiscount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, openday = #{openday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, closeday = #{closeday,jdbcType=INTEGER} where ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
